title: Bulk emails to all in a group
excerpt: It would be great if we could send an email to all users on a board or in a group instead of one at a time

posts.author: SallyB (Sally Bowes)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if we could send an email to all users on a board or in a group instead of one at a time

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sally! You can do this through creating a “team” in the account and then selecting the team as the recipient in your Gmail or Outlook integration, or selecting “Board subscribers” as the recipient in case you want to send it to everyone on the board.

Here’s a screenshot of those two options in an example automation recipe:

Screen Shot 2022-11-30 at 5.20.13 PM1712×706 61 KB

Would this work for the type of bulk emails you’re looking to send?
